summary:
NATIONAL EVENTS AND PRAYER TARGETS: Brandon discusses the importance of praying over the holiday shopping season, noting that there were no major incidents except for a tragic death in Washington. Brandon emphasizes a continued urgency to pray over the economy, the nation's capital, the White House tree lighting ceremony, the Rockefeller Center tree ceremony, and New Year's Eve to prevent targeted attacks.

EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS AND SUSTAINABILITY: Brandon outlines his strategies for anticipating a potential grid failure. Brandon recommends milling organic wheat berries at home using a Wonder Mill to make nutrient-dense bread, arguing that store-bought bleached flour and commercial survival food lack nutritional value. Brandon also suggests canning foods, raising chickens, and using solar-powered Tower Gardens paired with Jackery battery generators to grow vegetables indoors. Additionally, Brandon shares health practices focused on gut health, including making homemade kefir, brewing kombucha using a SCOBY mother, consuming raw goji berries, using Redmond salt, and taking D3 vitamins based on visions he received.

BARTERING AND SELF DEFENSE: Brandon advises keeping physical items for trade in case of economic collapse, specifically mentioning junk silver, pre-1964 quarters, and old coins from 1812. Furthermore, Brandon advocates for the Second Amendment and firearm ownership, stating that he trains his children to use AR-15s, shotguns, and handguns to protect their home from intruders during times of lawlessness.

END TIMES AND POLITICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon shares visions of the impending tribulation and the Antichrist system, identifying Elon Musk as a helper to the Antichrist through technologies like Neuralink, Starlink, digital currency, and AI. Brandon predicts major political and societal shakings in 2026, referencing 1 Corinthians 5:5, and foresees political theater, impeachment attempts, black swan events, and terrorist attacks. Brandon notes that Canada will experience extreme pressure, described as an olive press, which will lead to a massive spiritual awakening. Brandon emphasizes that the Church acts as the great restrainer on Earth and that its removal via the Rapture will unleash chaos. Brandon also urges prayer for a red wave in the 2026 midterm elections to pass foundational cryptocurrency legislation for a coming wealth transfer.

VISIONS CONCERNING DONALD TRUMP: Brandon recounts receiving an invitation to a White House Christmas party, though he declined because his wife could not attend. Brandon details a divine visitation from January 17th where he was told he would stand before President Trump. Brandon predicts that the glory of the Lord will visit the Oval Office, causing President Trump to fall prostrate and leading Secret Service agents to be born again. Brandon states that God has appointed Trump to bring peace and stability and that a massive revival resembling a worldwide Holy Ghost Woodstock will emerge.

PERSONAL BACKGROUND AND MINISTRY MANTLES: Brandon shares details about his past, noting that he struggled with learning disabilities and previously worked as a janitor for Kenneth Copeland's ministry, where he learned about prayer from Terri Copeland. Brandon mentions traveling with Benny Hinn as a catcher and receiving a prophetic word from Ralph Wilkerson. Brandon also recounts a recent prophetic experience where a minister laid hands on him, stating his spiritual name would change to Brother Seymour and that he would operate in an unprecedented end-time prophetic gifting. Brandon states he receives direct visions of heaven, including seeing God shaping expanding galaxies that will be assigned to believers after the millennium.
